basic_details.job_title: UP Excise Constable Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 722 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission (UPSSSC), Lucknow
basic_details.department: Office of the Excise Commissioner, Uttar Pradesh, Prayagraj
basic_details.total_vacancies: 722 (subject to change as per Government directives)
basic_details.short_information: Also Read: DSSSB 03/2026 1979 Assistant, Trained Graduate Teacher and More Posts Recruitment 2026

important_dates.physical standard test (pst) & physical: To be notified after Written Exam result

application_fee.general_fee: ₹25/- (Online processing fee only; Application fee: NIL)
application_fee.obc_fee: ₹25/- (Online processing fee only; Application fee: NIL)
application_fee.sc_fee: ₹25/- (Online processing fee only; Application fee: NIL)
application_fee.st_fee: ₹25/- (Online processing fee only; Application fee: NIL)
application_fee.payment_mode: Online only - Credit Card / Debit Card / Internet Banking / UPI / SBI e-Challan

age_limit.details: Age is reckoned as on 1st July of the year in which vacancies are advertised. Candidates must have attained 18 years and must not have exceeded 40 years as on the relevant date. Relaxations apply as per UP Government Presidential Directives.

vacancy_details.Department: Office of Excise Commissioner UP, Prayagraj
Office of Excise Commissioner UP, Prayagraj
Office of Excise Commissioner UP, Prayagraj
Office of Excise Commissioner UP, Prayagraj

vacancy_details.Details: Intermediate (Class 12th) or equivalent examination passed from Madhyamik Shiksha Parishad, Uttar Pradesh, or any examination recognized as equivalent by the Government.
Candidates who have served in the Territorial Army for at least two years, OR have obtained the 'B' Certificate of the National Cadet Corps (NCC), will be given preference in case of equal merit.

Must have appeared in PET-2025 and been issued a Score Card by UPSSSC. Only candidates shortlisted from PET-2025 Normalised Score (category-wise, 15 times the vacancies) are eligible to apply for the Main Examination.

salary_details.details: In addition to Basic Pay, candidates will be entitled to Dearness Allowance (DA), House Rent Allowance (HRA), and other allowances as per UP Government rules applicable to State Government employees.

selection_process: Part Subject No. of Questions Total Marks Time

Part-1 History of India & Indian National Movement; Geography of India & World; Economic & Social Development of India; Indian Polity & Indian Constitution; General Science & Technology; Environmental Ecology & Disaster Management; Current Events of National & International Importance; Data Interpretation; Important Legal Provisions & Policies related to Excise in UP 80 80 Two Hours (120 Minutes)
Part-2 Knowledge of Concepts of Computer & Information Technology and Contemporary Technological Development & Innovation 15 15
Part-3 General Information related to State of Uttar Pradesh 20 20
Selection will be conducted in the following stages:
Stage 1 - Shortlisting via PET-2025 Normalised Score
Candidates will be shortlisted for the Main Examination based on their PET-2025 Normalised Score (up to 15 times the vacancies
category-wise). Candidates scoring zero or negative (Absolute or Normalised) in PET-2025 will not be shortlisted.
Stage 2 - Written Examination (Main Examination / Likhit Pariksha)
The question paper will be objective and multiple-choice type. Each correct answer carries 1 mark. There is negative marking of 0.25 marks (¼ of marks) for each wrong answer.
Stage 3 - Physical Standard Test (PST) & Physical Efficiency Test (PET)
Candidates shortlisted on the basis of Written Examination marks will be called for PST and PET. These tests are qualifying in nature; selection is based on written examination marks.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only through the UPSSSC official website upsssc.gov.in. No application through any other mode will be accepted. Candidates must login using their PET-2025 Registration Number via OTP sent to their registered mobile number / email.
Visit upsssc.gov.in → Homepage → Live Advertisement Segment → Click on the relevant advertisement → Download/View the notification.
Login using PET-2025 Registration Number via OTP.
Personal details registered in PET-2025 (name, father's/husband's name, mother's name, UP domicile status, DOB, gender, marital status, contact mobile number, email etc.) will be auto-populated.
Fill in educational qualification details, category/reservation details, and other required information.
Verify Photo and Signature (as uploaded in PET-2025 - cannot be changed).
Select the post applied for and indicate preferential/desirable qualification if applicable.
Complete the Declaration and submit the fee online.
After successful fee payment/reconciliation, the application will be auto-submitted. Download and print the application form.

Application Amendment: Candidates can amend specified fields (correspondence address, category/reservation details such as EWS, DFF, PwBD, Ex-Servicemen, gender, outstanding sportsperson, essential/desirable qualification details, and marital status) up to 01-07-2026 through Applicant's Dashboard → Modify Application.
Apply Online at: upsssc.gov.in → Homepage → Live Advertisement Segment → Applicant Segment → Apply Online
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals who appeared in PET-2025 and have a valid UPSSSC Score Card are eligible to apply. Candidates from UP reserved categories must hold a caste certificate issued by a competent authority valid up to the application date or the last date mentioned in the advertisement. EWS candidates must hold an EWS certificate issued between 01-04-2026 and 24-06-2026, based on income of FY 2025-26, valid for FY 2026-27, in the prescribed GoI format. Only UP domicile candidates are entitled to reservation benefits; non-UP domicile candidates will be treated as Unreserved. Ex-Servicemen who retire on or before the last date of application (24-06-2026) are eligible for reservation. For female candidates, caste certificate issued from the father's side only will be accepted. If a candidate claims to be a DFF (Dependant of Freedom Fighter), they must have a certificate as per the GO dated 21 April 2015. PwBD candidates must hold a disability certificate in the updated format issued as per the UP Government GO dated 18-04-2022. Candidates employed in Central/State Government services must obtain a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their employer before participating in the selection process. State Government employees in service will get a relaxation of up to 5 years in the upper age limit. Date of birth as recorded in the High School / equivalent certificate will be accepted; no other document will be considered for date of birth. All future communications will be published on upsssc.gov.in only. Candidates must regularly visit the website. The Commission does not send individual communications. If the examination is held across multiple sessions/days, scores will be normalised as per the process notified on 22 May 2019. Candidates submitting multiple applications — only the last submitted application will be considered. All previous applications will be treated as cancelled. Malpractice, misconduct, or submission of false information at any stage will result in cancellation of candidature and debarment from future examinations as per UP Public Examination (Prevention of Unfair Means) Act-2024, dated 06-08-2024. Candidates selected under horizontal (क्षैतिज) reservation will be adjusted in their respective vertical category. The Commission's decision regarding eligibility/ineligibility of a candidate shall be final. In case of any discrepancy, the provisions of the relevant Service Rules, Reservation Act, and applicable Government Orders will prevail.

faq.question: Q1. What is UPSSSC Recruitment 2026 for Excise Constable posts?
faq.answer: UPSSSC Excise Constable Recruitment 2026 is a state‑level main examination conducted by Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission to fill 722 Group ‘C’ Excise Constable (Aabkari Sipahi) posts in the Excise Department based on PET‑2025 scores.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in UPSSSC Excise Constable Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 722 Excise Constable vacancies, including 246 UR, 128 SC, 12 ST, 165 OBC and 61 EWS posts, along with 110 special selection posts as per the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q3. What are the online application dates for UPSSSC Excise Constable Online Form 2026?
faq.answer: The online registration and fee payment window will open from 04 June 2026 and remain active until 24 June 2026, and the last date for fee reconciliation and application modification is 01 July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for UPSSSC Excise Constable Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs 25 for all categories, which is charged as an online processing fee and can be paid through credit card, debit card, net banking, UPI or SBI e‑Challan.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for UPSSSC Excise Constable Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 18 and 40 years of age as on 01 July 2026, with upper age relaxation applicable to reserved categories as per Uttar Pradesh government rules.

faq.question: Q6. What educational qualification and PET requirement are needed for UPSSSC Excise Constable 2026?
faq.answer: Applicants must have passed the Intermediate (10+2) or equivalent examination recognized by the UP Board and must have appeared in and qualified the UPSSSC Preliminary Eligibility Test‑2025 (PET‑2025) with a valid score card; candidates with zero or negative PET marks are not eligible.

faq.question: Q7. What is the pay scale for UPSSSC Excise Constable posts?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive salary in Pay Level‑2 of the 7th CPC, with a pay band of Rs 19,900 to Rs 63,200 plus admissible allowances as per state government norms.

faq.question: Q8. What is the exam pattern and selection process for UPSSSC Excise Constable Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is based on a main written examination of 100 objective questions (2 hours, 0.25 negative marking) followed by Physical Standards Test and Physical Efficiency Test, which are qualifying in nature; final merit is prepared solely on the basis of written exam marks.

faq.question: Q9. What are the physical standards and running requirements for UPSSSC Excise Constable 2026?
faq.answer: Male candidates must have a minimum height of 167.6 cm and chest 80–85 cm, and run 4.8 km in 25 minutes; female candidates must be at least 152 cm in height (147 cm for SC/ST), weigh at least 45 kg and run 2.4 km in 14 minutes.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply online for UPSSSC Excise Constable Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Eligible PET‑2025 qualified candidates must log in to upsssc.gov.in using their PET registration details and OTP, verify auto‑filled personal data and photo/signature, fill remaining details, pay the Rs 25 processing fee online, submit the form and take a printout of the final application for future reference.
